title: Codex CLI v0.111.0 Release
description: OpenAI released Codex CLI v0.111.0 on March 5, 2026, with distributions available for macOS (aarch64), Windows (aarch64, x86_64), and Linux (aarch64-gnu, aarch64-musl).

title: Continue v1.5.45 - /check Skill Integration
description: Released March 4, 2026, featuring updates to the running-locally documentation workflow section, replacing check CLI with /check skill, and updating primary local path to use the /check skill installed via npx skills add.

title: Continue Hooks System for CLI Event Interception
description: March 4, 2026 feature adding Claude Code-compatible hooks system allowing external handlers (shell commands, HTTP endpoints) to intercept and respond to CLI events. Supports 16 event types with regex-based matching.

title: Aider Model Support Expansion - Claude 4.5/4.6 and DeepSeek
description: March 3, 2026 update adding support for Claude 4.5/4.6 (sonnet/haiku/opus), Gemini 2.5 Flash and Flash-Lite, Gemini 3 preview models, and DeepSeek Reasoner. Repository map now supports Fortran, Haskell, Julia, and Zig.

title: Aider Overeager Prompts for GPT Models
description: March 3, 2026 feature adding overeager: true setting to gpt-5.2-codex model variants and gpt-4-turbo, with enhanced overeager prompt functionality for more proactive AI responses.

title: Continue v1.5.44 CLI Release
description: Released March 2, 2026 as a CLI release built from the main branch, continuing active development on the AI coding assistant extension.

title: Claude Code v2.1.63 - /simplify, /batch Commands and HTTP Hooks
description: Released February 28, 2026, adding /simplify and /batch bundled slash commands, HTTP hooks for external integrations, and extensive memory leak fixes across the platform (20+ fixes).

title: Continue v1.3.32 - MCP App Support and cn checks
description: Released February 27, 2026, adding limited MCP (Model Context Protocol) App support, cn checks CLI command, agent mode for LM Studio models, and updated default model to Claude Opus 4.6.

title: Cursor Cloud Agents with Computer Use
description: Released February 26, 2026 - Cloud agents can now use the software they create to test changes and demo their work, producing merge-ready PRs with artifacts (videos, screenshots, and logs). Available on web, desktop, mobile, Slack, and GitHub.

community_feedback.quote: A new era has begun - Cloud Agents break previous limitations

title: Cursor Bugbot Autofix with Cloud Agents
description: Released February 26, 2026 - Bugbot can automatically fix issues it finds in pull requests using cloud agents that run in isolated VMs with full development environments. Over 35% of autofix changes are merged into base PRs. Resolution rate increased from 52% to 76%.

community_feedback.quote: Can significantly improve efficiency - You submit a PR, wake up the next morning, and Bugbot has already fixed 10 small issues
Over-reliance might cause developers to lose code understanding. Risk of blindly accepting fixes without reviewing

title: Claude Code v2.1.59 - Auto-Memory and /copy Command
description: Released February 26, 2026, featuring auto-memory management with /memory commands, new /copy command with interactive picker for code blocks.

community_feedback.quote: How to turn it off - the most discussed topic was disabling auto memory
Claude writes to Memory.md instead of fixing bugs - user reported it responded 'okay, won't happen again' and wrote a note without actually fixing the code
Performance degradation - users reported that filling the context window with memories actually makes Claude perform worse
It solves the cross-session memory pain point. No more manual CLAUDE.md maintenance
GitHub public commit share reached 4%, expected to exceed 20% by end of 2026

title: Claude Code Security Module
description: Released February 20, 2026 - Web-based security module combining automated scanning with human-like analysis to identify business logic defects and access control vulnerabilities. Discovered 500+ vulnerabilities in open-source code.

community_feedback.quote: Cybersecurity stocks dropped significantly upon announcement: CrowdStrike -8%, Cloudflare -8%, Okta -9%
Some irony noted: Claude Code itself had security issues in January 2026 (ignored .claudeignore and read .env files with passwords)
Claude Code Security: AI猎杀代码漏洞时代正式开启

title: Claude Code Remote Control Feature
description: Launched February 20, 2026 - Enables developers to seamlessly transition coding sessions between computer terminal and mobile devices with unique session links and QR codes.

community_feedback.quote: Reports of Microsoft internally promoting Claude Code

title: GitHub Copilot GPT-5.3-Codex Model Integration
description: GitHub rolled out OpenAI's GPT-5.3-Codex model to Copilot on February 20, 2026, delivering approximately 25% better performance for agentic coding tasks. Available for Pro, Pro+, Business, and Enterprise users across VS Code, GitHub web, mobile, CLI, and Coding Agent environments.

community_feedback.quote: Community discussion about improving LLM coding effectiveness through optimizations, with many users noting that model improvements like GPT-5.3-Codex significantly enhance real-world coding performance

title: Gemini 3.1 Pro Release with Extended Context
description: Google released Gemini 3.1 Pro on February 19-20, 2026, featuring stronger code generation, more stable agent performance, and 1M-2M+ token context. Achieved 77.4% on SWE-bench Verified and 80.6% on SWE-Bench Verified. Won 12/16 benchmarks against Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.2. ARC-AGI-2 score of 77.1% (doubled from 31.1%). Free for all users.

community_feedback.quote: Free for all users with higher quotas for Pro and Ultra subscribers
Surpassed Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.2 in multiple benchmark tests

title: Cursor Background Agents in Slack Integration
description: Released February 19, 2026 - Cursor Background Agents integration with Slack allows users to launch agents directly from Slack by mentioning @Cursor. Agents can read threads, understand context, and create PRs without leaving the conversation.

community_feedback.quote: 用了 Cursor 的后台 Agent 一周了，真香。不用重复输提示，它自己创建 PR，还能在云端工作区跑。
这过程得烧掉多少 token 啊……我见过有人不到一周就烧了三四千刀。
